description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, modern design and a natural wood grain finish. The tabletop is flat and smooth, supported by four straight, sturdy legs positioned at each corner. The wood grain runs lengthwise along the tabletop and legs, giving it a cohesive and uniform appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, hardware, or additional features such as drawers or shelves. The table's proportions suggest it is suitable for dining, working, or general utility in urban environments. Its minimalist style makes it versatile for both residential and commercial settings.
description: A rectangular, modern wooden table with a smooth, natural wood grain finish and four straight legs. The design is minimalist and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow depth of the tabletop and the straight alignment of the legs, emphasizing the table's thickness and clean lines.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the tabletop and four legs with the same wood grain and proportions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same narrow profile and visible tabletop thickness.
